description: Style NoteAdd a touch of sizzle to any outfit with this exotic sling bag from pitaraa.  Choose from a variety of colours and styles for your next exciting night on the townProduct DetailsYellow sling bag that has a press buttoned closureHas one id card holder, seven card slots, one big insert pocket on the top, two insert pockets on the side with a zipped coin pocketOne flap pocket with a press buttoned closureOne adjustable and removable long strap for carrying easeOne zipped pocket at the backMaterial and CareGlossy leatheretteSizeDimensions: 20 cm x 14.5 cm
